# E2E test suite dependencies. Install with:
#   pip install -r tests/e2e/requirements.txt
#
# Selenium 4.6+ ships "Selenium Manager", which auto-downloads a matching
# chromedriver — no manual driver install needed.
selenium>=4.20,<5
pytest>=8.0,<9
allure-pytest>=2.13,<3
# report.html is generated by our own renderer (tests/e2e/_report.py) via
# pytest hooks in conftest.py — a single, self-contained, double-click-
# openable file with no external assets. No third-party HTML plugin needed.
